findings: Preflight or auth failures are contained by marking the run and commander swarm-state files blocked and appending commander_blocked events.
Metaswarm spawning is bounded to at most 5 commanders, matching the configured full-250-per-commander profile.
Commander nonzero exits are recorded as commander_launch_failed with failed status, containing failure state in telemetry.
Commander instructions explicitly enforce Depth Guard and leaf-node worker prompts.
If PID validation fails at launch summary time, stampede.sh only prints failed-to-start and does not update swarm-state.json or child-agents.jsonl, weakening failure visibility.
